metadata.description: Red Hat Product Security skills library — 130 security skills for AI coding assistants covering secure development, security testing, security auditing, and developer tooling, plus the curated 12-skill GE Core set.

plugins.name: prodsec-skills
plugins.description: Security guidance skills for AI coding assistants. Covers cryptography, web security, supply chain, MCP servers, Kubernetes, API gateways, fuzzing, static analysis, audit workflows, and more.

plugins.name: prodsec-skills-ge-core
plugins.description: GE Core — 12 curated security skills for developers writing code daily: injection defense, web application security, secrets detection, container hardening, OpenShift/Kubernetes access control, dependency auditing, authentication, secure-by-design, audit logging, and AI security.
